basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT) recruits 30 Apprentice Trainees Posts. Candidates with Diploma , B.Tech/B.E can attend for walk in on 10 June 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Technician/Diploma: Min 18, Max 24 years. Graduate/Degree: Min 21, Max 26 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Engineering/Technology or Graduate Degree in Engineering/Technology/relevant discipline.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.12000/- for Technician, Rs.13000/- for Graduate

seo_tags: NIOT Apprentice Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 30 Posts
